name: fiber-merchant-kit
description: Fiber Merchant Kit — Payment processing infrastructure for Fiber Network

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w packages/api-server" "npm run dev -w packages/admin-dashboard" "npm run dev -w packages/demo-store"
scripts.judge:verify: npm run demo:smoke && npm run test --workspaces --if-present && npm run lint --workspaces --if-present && npm run build --workspaces
